'''Imperial Walker''' was a two-legged [[Walker/Legends|walker]] model used by [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]] during the [[Galactic War]] in the [[Revanite crisis]] and the years afterward. [[Aegis Squadron]] and [[Guard Squadron]] were composed of the walkers of this type, as was [[Crimson Talon (walker)|Crimson Talon]], a walker used during the [[War on Iokath]].<ref name="SWTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
This walker model was introduced in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan]]'' expansion to represent the mobile walkers that can serve as either friendly or hostile NPCs, as opposed to the [[Unidentified military walker|walker model]] from the [[Star Wars: The Old Republic|original game]] that only appears static as part of the environment.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Fallen Empire]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Eternal Throne]]''
